ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibiotic product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the antibiotic product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the antibiotic product */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product */,
  "formulation" TEXT /* Formulation of the antibiotic (e.g., injectable, oral) */,
  "dosage_instructions" TEXT /* Recommended dosage instructions for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bacteria" (
  "bacteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bacteria */,
  "bacteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the bacteria */,
  "bacteria_type" TEXT /* Type of bacteria (e.g., Gram-positive, Gram-negative) */,
  "common_infections" TEXT /* Common infections caused by the bacteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bacteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawals" (
  "withdrawal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antibiotic product */,
  "withdrawal_milk" TEXT /* Withdrawal time for milk */,
  "withdrawal_meat" TEXT /* Withdrawal time for meat */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body that sets the withdrawal times */,
  "reference_link" TEXT /* Link to the regulatory document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withdrawal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawals_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_bacteria" (
  "product_bacteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-bacteria association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antibiotic product */,
  "bacteria_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bacteria */,
  "efficacy_rating" TEXT /* Efficacy rating of the product against the bacteria */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_bacteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_bacteria_bacteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("bacteria_id") REFERENCES bacteria ("bacteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_bacteria_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosages" (
  "dosage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antibiotic product */,
  "dosage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dosage (e.g., once per day) */,
  "dosage_duration" TEXT /* Duration of treatment (e.g., for 3 days) */,
  "dosage_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dosage (e.g., mg, ml) */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dosages_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., veterinarian, farm manager) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "practice_location" TEXT /* Practice location for veterinarians */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antibiotic product used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who prescribed/used the product */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was used */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product used */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product used */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
